access_enforce: Only show cases to enrolled course members
access_enforce_help: Off: students see every published case. On: students only see cases assigned to their courses.
access_intro: Decide who sees which cases and set up your user accounts.
access_users_hint: Create teacher and student accounts under Settings → Users — individually, in bulk, or by CSV import. Students can also self-register and join a course with a class code.
admin_subtitle: Get Rohy ready for your students — every setting here stays editable later in Settings.
affect_enable: Route observed learner affect to the AI patient
affect_note: When enabled, the patient can subtly adapt to a visibly anxious learner. Details under Settings → Affect.
case_card_hint: You can switch cases at any time via the menu → Cases.
case_card_language_fallback: No case exists in your language yet, so you'll start with the default case.
case_card_none: No case is published for you yet — check back with your teacher.
case_hint: Manage courses and author new cases later under Settings → Cases and Settings → Courses.
case_intro: Students land directly on a patient case. Rohy picks the case matching each student's language; the default case below is the fallback when no match exists.
case_none: No cases yet — the built-in demo course is created automatically on first start, or you can author one under Settings → Cases.
emotion_consent_note: Students see a consent choice on their first login and can stop capture at any time.
emotion_intro: Rohy can observe learners' facial emotion during sessions (Oyon). Analysis runs in the browser; storing data additionally requires each student's consent.
emotion_unavailable: The Oyon add-on is not available on this server.
lang_intro: New users start in this language. Every user can still pick their own language at any time — this only sets the default.
llm_intro: The AI engine powers every patient conversation. Pick a provider, choose a model, and run the test — students can chat once it passes.
llm_load_failed: Could not load the AI settings
llm_warning: Students cannot talk to patients until this connection works.
oyon_card_note: Analysis runs locally in your browser; recordings are only stored with your consent ({version}). You can stop capture at any time from the camera pill, and change this choice under Settings → Oyon.
oyon_card_toggle: Allow camera-based emotion capture during my sessions
recall_hint: You can reopen this checklist at any time from the top-bar menu → Platform setup.
teacher_card_body: Author cases under Settings → Cases, and manage your courses, lessons and students under Settings → Courses and Settings → Users.
voice_card_toggle: I want to talk to the patient out loud
voice_hint: Voice engines, per-language default voices and cloud voice keys live under Settings → Voice.
voice_intro: With voice mode, students talk to the patient and hear spoken replies. Off by default; when enabled, each student chooses per session.
voice_mic_blocked: Microphone blocked — allow access in your browser's site settings
voice_missing_defaults: No default voice is set for: {langs}. Patients in those languages have no fallback voice — set them under Settings → Voice.
welcome_intro: A few quick choices before your first patient. Everything can be changed later from the top-bar menu.
